store_summary.store_level_warning: Store FAQ coverage is 'Moderate'. AI agents answering buyer questions will find gaps and lose trust.

products.title: Nomad 30L Travel Backpack
products.description: A durable, water-resistant 30L backpack perfect for weekend trips. Features a dedicated 15-inch laptop sleeve, padded shoulder straps, and a breathable mesh back panel. Dimensions: 20 x 13 x 8 inches. Weight: 2.5 lbs.
products.displacement_risk: MODERATE: Vulnerable to highly-specific generic listings.
products.competitor_advantage: Crystal clear physical dimensions, massive review count, guaranteed 2-day delivery.

travel_planner.reason: Product provides dimensions, weight, and laptop sleeve size

deal_finder.reason: Lacks explicit material quality and warranty details in product description

stylist.reason: No color options or brand information provided

suggested_fix.updated_text: A durable, water-resistant 30L backpack made from high-quality nylon, perfect for weekend trips. Features a dedicated 15-inch laptop sleeve, padded shoulder straps, and a breathable mesh back panel. Dimensions: 20 x 13 x 8 inches. Weight: 2.5 lbs. Available in black, blue, and grey. 1-year limited warranty on defects.

products.title: Quantum XF-900
products.description: XF-900 features a hyper-threaded multi-layer capacitive mesh with an output vector of 45 mV. The sub-assembly integration allows for zero-latency phase shifting in the Q-band spectrum. Manufactured in facility 7B.
products.displacement_risk: SEVERE: An AI shopping agent is highly likely to ignore this product and recommend the 'Industrial Standard Signal Phase Module' instead because of gaps.

deterministic_issues: Weak Signal: Product title is too vague (under 4 words). AI agents cannot infer category, use-case, or audience from it.

suggested_fix.updated_text: The Quantum XF-900 features a hyper-threaded multi-layer capacitive mesh with an output vector of 45 mV, manufactured from high-quality ceramic materials, and operates within a temperature range of -20 to 80 degrees Celsius. It is designed for industrial tech manufacturers, with a 1-year limited warranty, and is available for bulk orders with competitive B2B pricing.

products.title: Aero Lite Weekend Carry-on Suitcase
products.description: The perfect lightweight suitcase for your weekend getaways. Features omni-directional spinner wheels, a TSA-approved lock, and a sleek hard-shell exterior. Easily fits in the overhead bin of most major airlines.
products.displacement_risk: MODERATE: Vulnerable to highly-specific generic listings.
products.competitor_advantage: Crystal clear physical dimensions, massive review count, guaranteed 2-day delivery.
deterministic_issues: Missing Spec: Luggage lacks precise hardware dimensions.

suggested_fix.updated_text: The Aero Lite Weekend Carry-on Suitcase is a regulation-compatible, lightweight hard-shell carry-on suitcase, measuring 22 inches (55.88 cm) in height, 14 inches (35.56 cm) in width, and 9 inches (22.86 cm) in depth, weighing 6.3 lbs (2.86 kg), featuring omni-directional spinner wheels, a TSA-approved lock, and a sleek hard-shell exterior in a range of colors, including black, navy, and red, perfect for frequent airline travelers.
